title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Airtel India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Airtel India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Airtel India family as a Backend Developer in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Airtel India:
Airtel India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Airtel India!
